examples: Syphilis was the most feared of venereal diseases.
Venereal disease continues to be a significant public health problem.
Aids and some venereal diseases, which are called century fatal diseases, are now doing serious harm to international community.
Between 1939 and 1941 the number of new cases of venereal disease reported from clinics in England nearly doubled.
There are venereal diseases that can be spread even with the use of a condom including the Human papillomavirus or HPV.
